package rulecoverage

func NegativeUnscopedQueryWithoutExplicitDangerNaming() string {
    ruleID := "unscoped_query_without_explicit_danger_naming"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`Unscoped()` usage in generic repository methods without a clearly dangerous or admin-only name."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
